display.purpose: Page and article h1 text. Compact, heavy, never hero-scale.

title.purpose: Writing list titles and prominent links.

body.purpose: Long-form prose with Tailwind Typography rhythm.

label.purpose: Dates, metadata, and compact language chips.

motion.name: underline-color
motion.purpose: Only text decoration color transitions on hover links.

components.name: Hover Link
components.description: Default link treatment for prose and non-current nav links.
components.css: .ds-hover-link { color: #09090b; font: 500 1rem/1.5 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 2px; text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 25%, transparent); transition-property: color, background-color, border-color, outline-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke; transition-duration: 150ms; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-hover-link:hover { text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-hover-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Main Nav Link
components.html: ConsultingCV
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 16px; align-items: center; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { color: #09090b; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 2px; text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 25%, transparent); transition: text-decoration-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-nav-link-current { font-weight: 600; text-decoration-color: #09090b; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Locale Chip
components.css: .ds-locale-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; border-radius: 4px; background: #ffffff; color: #334155; padding: 4px 12px; min-height: 28px; font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-locale-chip:hover { border-color: #0f172a; color: #0f172a; } .ds-locale-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Locale Chip Active
components.description: Language switcher chip for the current locale.
components.css: .ds-locale-chip-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #0f172a; border-radius: 4px; background: #0f172a; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; min-height: 28px; font: 500 0.875rem/1.25 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-locale-chip-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Writing List Item
components.description: Flat article teaser row with date, title, and compact summary.
components.html:
17 Jun 2026npm install is dangerous

A focused technical argument with enough context to decide what to do next.
components.css: .ds-writing-item { padding: 16px 0; border-top: 1px solid #e4e4e7; color: #09090b; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-writing-date { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; color: #71717a; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-writing-title { display: inline; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 2px; text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 25%, transparent); transition: text-decoration-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-writing-title:hover { text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-writing-title:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-writing-teaser { max-width: 44ch; margin: 4px 0 0; color: #52525b; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; }

components.name: Article Date
components.css: .ds-article-date { margin: 8px 0 32px; color: #71717a; font: 500 0.875rem/1.5rem ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: CV Icon Link
components.description: Compact CV contact link with a 16px icon.
components.html: mail@example.com
components.css: .ds-cv-icon-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: #0f172a; font: 400 1rem/1.75 ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; } .ds-cv-icon-link svg { flex: 0 0 16px; } .ds-cv-icon-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Details Summary
components.description: Disclosure summary used for past projects on localized home pages.
components.css: .ds-details { margin-top: 24px; color: #09090b; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-summary { cursor: pointer; color: #0f172a; font-weight: 600; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 2px; text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 25%, transparent); transition: text-decoration-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-summary:hover { text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-summary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f172a; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-details p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: #52525b; }

narrative.overview:
Astrosite is a calm technical notebook, not a portfolio campaign. The system should feel like a working engineer's public record: plain page, strong titles, compact navigation, readable prose, and just enough structure to make writing, consulting context, products, and CV evidence easy to scan.

The visual language is intentionally flat. White space, text weight, dividers, link underlines, and print-aware layout do the work that cards, shadows, hero panels, and decorative imagery would normally try to do. This restraint serves search clarity and long-form reading, while still leaving enough typographic contrast for a visitor to understand hierarchy quickly.

The system explicitly rejects the PRODUCT.md anti-references: generic SaaS landing-page patterns, decorative AI-generated editorial tropes, portfolio gloss, and visual flourishes that compete with reading, search clarity, or technical credibility.
keyCharacteristics: Prose-first pages with narrow reading width and comfortable line-height.
Dense but calm hierarchy: bold headings, medium navigation, muted dates.
Flat surfaces: dividers and typographic weight replace cards and shadows.
Multilingual parity: English, Russian, and Tatar pages keep the same structure.
Print-aware CV: compact, readable, and low-chrome when printed.

rules.name: The Ink First Rule
rules.body: Body text stays near-black on white. Do not soften prose into pale gray for elegance.

rules.name: The Accent Is Evidence Rule
rules.body: Color only appears when it carries state, links, dates, or CV-specific link affordance. Do not add decorative accent fills.

rules.name: The Reading Is The Product Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce ornamental display faces, italic editorial treatments, or tracked uppercase section labels. The writing must remain the strongest signal.

rules.name: The No Negative Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing stays at `0`. This site does not use compressed display typography.

rules.name: The No Shadow Rule
rules.body: Do not add card shadows, glass panels, or soft glow effects. If a surface needs separation, use a divider, spacing, or a filled state.

rules.name: The Divider Over Card Rule
rules.body: Writing lists use `border-y` and `divide-y`; they are not card grids.

dos: Do keep long prose on a narrow measure with the existing `prose` rhythm.
Do use `hover-underline` for normal prose and navigation links.
Do preserve multilingual parity across English, Russian, and Tatar surfaces.
Do use dividers and typographic weight before adding containers.
Do keep CV changes print-readable, compact, and low-chrome.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing-page patterns.
Don't use decorative AI-generated editorial tropes.
Don't add visual flourishes that compete with reading, search clarity, or technical credibility.
Don't add card grids, hero metrics, gradient text, glass panels, or ornamental imagery to article pages.
Don't use repeated tiny uppercase tracked labels above section headings.
Don't soften body copy below WCAG AA contrast.
